title: [FIRRTL][GrandCentral] Donot assume parent is LCA
body:
This commit removes the assumption that the `parent` is always the lowest common ancestor module for a `GrandCentralView` annotation. Instead, compute the lca, between the source and the companion. 
The only assumption being made here is that the source module and the component module have a unique path.   The component and source must be specified as non-local path if there exists multiple paths.
